'''Joli K'atel''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who is the daughter of the leader of [[Belasco/Legends|Belasco]], [[Min K'atel]]. She was affected by the bacterium created by [[Jenna Zan Arbor]]. Finally, she could get cured.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Dangerous Rescue]]'' {{1st}}
